message:
perf(vdbe): replace HashMap::is_empty() subtype check with bool flag on register writes

V1.4: Every register write (set_reg, set_reg_int, set_reg_fast) checked
register_subtypes.is_empty() to decide whether to remove subtype entries.
HashMap::is_empty() touches the HashMap metadata (bucket count, len field)
on every call, polluting the L1 cache.

Replace with a `has_subtypes: bool` field that's set true only when
subtypes are actually inserted (JSON functions) and cleared on reset.
For the INSERT hot path (no JSON), this is always false — a simple
register comparison instead of a HashMap metadata probe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
